title: Market Brief — Monday, May 18, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s at 85% and MI300X at 60% availability signal oversupply on last-gen silicon, while B200s at 25% are scarce and GB200s at 10% face severe shortage with no transparent spot pricing yet. The biggest price signal is B200 spot at $4.20/hr median — a 110% premium over H100 — confirming demand is stampeding toward next-gen compute while legacy iron rusts.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s at 85% and MI300X at 60% availability signal oversupply on last-gen silicon, while B200s at 25% are scarce and GB200s at 10% face severe shortage with no transparent spot pricing yet. The biggest price signal is B200 spot at $4.20/hr median — a 110% premium over H100 — confirming demand is stampeding toward next-gen compute while legacy iron rusts.

DeepSeek is burning cash hardest: V3.2 output at $0.378/M sits well below TCO-adjusted Llama 70B inference cost of ~$5.03/M on B200s (the cheapest viable GPU), implying a loss of roughly $4.65 per million output tokens. Meta's Llama 4 Maverick at $0.60/M output is similarly underwater. OpenAI's o3 Pro at $80/M output and Anthropic's Opus 4.6 at $25/M are the only tiers printing real margin — everyone in the mid-tier is subsidizing growth.

OpenAI o3 Pro is overvalued at $80/M output — a 16x premium over GPT-5 for reasoning gains that don't scale linearly, making it vulnerable to DeepSeek R1 substitution at $2.50/M. Undervalued trade: lock in B200 spot capacity now at $4.20/hr before GB200 allocation drought pushes overflow demand back up the stack.
bullets: 85% availability on A100s confirms oversupply of legacy compute.
10% availability on GB200s signals severe shortage with no spot median established.
$4.65 per million tokens is DeepSeek V3.2's estimated loss versus TCO-adjusted B200 production cost.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
$80/M output for o3 Pro is 212x more expensive than DeepSeek V3.2 output.
25% B200 availability marks the tightest supply among priced GPUs this cycle.
